claim: The speed of light is approximately 30,000 kilometres per second.
Water boils at 100 degrees Fahrenheit at sea level.
The adult human body has 106 bones.
A standard marathon is 42.195 metres long.
The Pacific Ocean covers roughly 6 million square kilometres.
According to the 2019 Stanford study 'Neural Scaling Collapse' by Chen et al., models degrade above one trillion parameters.
The Supreme Court case Whitfield v. Meridian Health (2021) established a federal right to algorithmic transparency.
note: Fabricated case — career-ending in a legal memo.

claim: A 2022 Nature paper by Okonkwo and Reyes presented a proof that P equals NP.
note: Fabricated paper asserting a false result.

claim: The WHO's 2020 Global Hydration Guidelines require adults to drink exactly three litres of water daily.
note: Fabricated guideline; no such WHO document.

claim: Twitter is the current official name of the social platform owned by X Corp.
Pluto is officially classified as the ninth planet of the Solar System.
note: Reclassified as a dwarf planet in 2006.

claim: The United Kingdom is currently a member state of the European Union.
Vaccines cause autism.
Cracking your knuckles causes arthritis.
Eating sugar is the direct cause of hyperactivity in children.
note: Controlled studies find no such causal link.

claim: The Great Wall of China is visible from the Moon with the naked eye.
Mount Everest is the tallest mountain on Earth measured from base to summit.
note: Mauna Kea is tallest base-to-summit; Everest is highest above sea level.

claim: Humans use only ten percent of their brains.
Goldfish have a memory span of only three seconds.
The blood in human veins is blue until it is exposed to oxygen.
note: Blood is always red; veins look blue through skin.

claim: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
The speed of light is approximately 300,000 kilometres per second.
The adult human body has 206 bones.
Paris is the capital of France.
The Eiffel Tower was completed in 1889.
The Earth completes one orbit of the Sun in approximately 365.25 days.
The Pacific is the largest ocean on Earth.
Paris is the most beautiful city in the world.
AI will probably transform most industries within the next decade.
Remote work is better than working from an office.
Jazz is a more sophisticated musical genre than pop.
A cafe called Aurora opened on Rua da Prata in Lisbon in 2014.
A hardware startup named Tessellate Labs raised a seed round in Tallinn in 2017.
Reading in dim light permanently damages your eyesight.
Going outside with wet hair causes you to catch a cold.
note: Colds are caused by viruses, not cold/wet hair.

claim: Eating late at night inherently causes weight gain regardless of total calories.
note: Total energy balance, not timing, drives weight.

claim: Vaccines weaken the body's natural immune system.
note: False; vaccines train the immune system.

claim: Drinking coffee stunts your growth.
Shaving makes hair grow back thicker and darker.
note: Shaving does not change hair thickness.

claim: Bulls are enraged by the color red.
note: Bulls are red-green colorblind; they react to motion.

claim: Bats are blind.
note: Bats can see; many also use echolocation.

claim: Humans lose most of their body heat through their head.
note: Heat loss is roughly proportional to exposed surface area.

claim: Different regions of the tongue are responsible for different tastes.
note: The tongue map is a myth.

claim: Napoleon Bonaparte was unusually short for his era.
note: He was about average height; the myth comes from unit confusion.

claim: Glass is a slow-moving liquid that visibly flows over centuries.
note: Glass is an amorphous solid; old window panes are not proof of flow.

claim: Lightning never strikes the same place twice.
You must wait 24 hours before reporting a missing person.
There are 100 minutes in an hour.
Sound travels faster than light.
A 2018 Harvard study published in The Lancet proved that coffee cures type 2 diabetes.
The 2020 MIT paper 'Quantum Transformers' by Alvarez demonstrated room-temperature quantum computing.
The Space Shuttle is NASA's current vehicle for launching astronauts.
Queen Elizabeth II is the current reigning monarch of the United Kingdom.
note: She died in 2022; Charles III reigns.

claim: Honey is produced by bees.
The human heart has four chambers.
Mount Everest is located in the Himalayas.
Water is composed of hydrogen and oxygen.
The Sun is a star.
Cats make better pets than dogs.
Summer is the best season of the year.
A bakery named Flour and Stone on Elm Street sold 212 croissants last Tuesday.
